FX.title: USD/JPY Bearish Momentum Surges Post 200-HMA Fracture
FX.comment: 200-HMA breach and decoupling from 160.00 signal bearish continuation.

STOCKS.title: S&P 500 at 5,200: Decoding the Consolidation Phase Ahead of Fed Catalyst
tldr_points: Index consolidates near pivotal 5,200 as mixed sector signals offset tech resilience
Commodity strength (gold) provides indirect support but earnings dispersion creates headwinds
Federal Reserve policy expectations remain primary catalyst for directional resolution
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 consolidates near 5,200 as tech resilience offsets commodity pressures. Key levels ahead of Fed.
STOCKS.comment: Index consolidates; no directional edge until Fed catalyst or technical breakout/breakdown is confirmed.

CRYPTO.title: BTC/USD Institutional Tactical Report: Neutral Stance as Technicals Unavailable Amid Regulatory Headwinds
tldr_points: Technical levels (price, MA20, RSI) undisclosed; actionable signal impossible
Regulatory pessimism (TD Cowen) dominates fundamental landscape
Neutral bias maintained; await price/RSI confirmation before deployment
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC/USD tactical neutrality persists without disclosed technicals; regulatory bill odds dim.
CRYPTO.comment: Technical data unavailable; no actionable signal can be generated.
